creator: kristinacors
caption: Planning a trip to Paris? Check out the 7 day Paris itinerary I created! It includes 4 aesthetic spots to visit every single day and 28 spots total. Each day is organized by neighborhood and includes the time it takes to walk and/or drive from place to place. Click on the link in my bio to find it! #travelbucketlist #parisfrance #emilyinparis #parisfashionweek #parisitinerary

transcription.text: Hey Dan, I mean bonjour. You mean au revoir. Goodbye Humphrey, we're leaving. Is that Blair? Where are you guys going? Paris.
